## Meeting Purpose

[Review ProjectMark's content strategy progress and plan for the next quarter.](https://fathom.video/share/858bUpRJ4Pm-S4xPxMWhoZsUzNzbzixh?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content performance: 71 clicks, 11k impressions; top performer: constructionist process blog](https://fathom.video/share/858bUpRJ4Pm-S4xPxMWhoZsUzNzbzixh?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)
  - [Strategy shift: Focus on enriching 20 key articles and publishing new, quality-controlled content](https://fathom.video/share/858bUpRJ4Pm-S4xPxMWhoZsUzNzbzixh?tab=summary&timestamp=744.0)
  - [Keyword opportunities: Expand focus to include bid management, pipeline management, and project opportunity management](https://fathom.video/share/858bUpRJ4Pm-S4xPxMWhoZsUzNzbzixh?tab=summary&timestamp=1194.0)
  - [Next steps: Develop content buckets, set traffic goals, and improve meta descriptions for underperforming content](https://fathom.video/share/858bUpRJ4Pm-S4xPxMWhoZsUzNzbzixh?tab=summary&timestamp=1396.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance Overview

  - [71 clicks and 11,000 impressions overall](https://fathom.video/share/858bUpRJ4Pm-S4xPxMWhoZsUzNzbzixh?tab=summary&timestamp=146.0)
  - [Top performing blog: constructionist process](https://fathom.video/share/858bUpRJ4Pm-S4xPxMWhoZsUzNzbzixh?tab=summary&timestamp=146.0)
  - [Recent period (21 days): Lower clicks due to holidays, but 1,000 higher impressions](https://fathom.video/share/858bUpRJ4Pm-S4xPxMWhoZsUzNzbzixh?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Daily averages improving: From 200 to \~1,000 impressions, 8-10 clicks](https://fathom.video/share/858bUpRJ4Pm-S4xPxMWhoZsUzNzbzixh?tab=summary&timestamp=405.0)
  - [Key ranking keywords: construction CRM, construction sales process, construction leads](https://fathom.video/share/858bUpRJ4Pm-S4xPxMWhoZsUzNzbzixh?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)

### Content Strategy Refinement

  - [Shift focus to enriching 20 key articles with internal links and updated information](https://fathom.video/share/858bUpRJ4Pm-S4xPxMWhoZsUzNzbzixh?tab=summary&timestamp=744.0)
  - [Balance between publishing new content and improving existing articles](https://fathom.video/share/858bUpRJ4Pm-S4xPxMWhoZsUzNzbzixh?tab=summary&timestamp=1024.0)
  - [Aim for 70% quality on general topics, 100% accuracy on technical subjects](https://fathom.video/share/858bUpRJ4Pm-S4xPxMWhoZsUzNzbzixh?tab=summary&timestamp=1024.0)
  - [Target moving articles ranking 21-100 into top 10 positions](https://fathom.video/share/858bUpRJ4Pm-S4xPxMWhoZsUzNzbzixh?tab=summary&timestamp=1194.0)
  - [Maintain balance between informational (66 keywords) and commercial (67 keywords) content](https://fathom.video/share/858bUpRJ4Pm-S4xPxMWhoZsUzNzbzixh?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)

### Keyword Expansion

  - [New focus areas suggested by Gus based on client feedback:](https://fathom.video/share/858bUpRJ4Pm-S4xPxMWhoZsUzNzbzixh?tab=summary&timestamp=1340.0)
      - [Bid management](https://fathom.video/share/858bUpRJ4Pm-S4xPxMWhoZsUzNzbzixh?tab=summary&timestamp=1340.0)
      - [Pipeline management](https://fathom.video/share/858bUpRJ4Pm-S4xPxMWhoZsUzNzbzixh?tab=summary&timestamp=1340.0)
      - [Project opportunity management](https://fathom.video/share/858bUpRJ4Pm-S4xPxMWhoZsUzNzbzixh?tab=summary&timestamp=1340.0)
      - [Client relationship management](https://fathom.video/share/858bUpRJ4Pm-S4xPxMWhoZsUzNzbzixh?tab=summary&timestamp=1340.0)
  - [Additional suggestions from Tom:](https://fathom.video/share/858bUpRJ4Pm-S4xPxMWhoZsUzNzbzixh?tab=summary&timestamp=1369.0)
      - [Project data management](https://fathom.video/share/858bUpRJ4Pm-S4xPxMWhoZsUzNzbzixh?tab=summary&timestamp=1369.0)
      - [Project team management](https://fathom.video/share/858bUpRJ4Pm-S4xPxMWhoZsUzNzbzixh?tab=summary&timestamp=1369.0)
      - [Construction bid management](https://fathom.video/share/858bUpRJ4Pm-S4xPxMWhoZsUzNzbzixh?tab=summary&timestamp=1369.0)

### Technical SEO Improvements

  - [Sami updating meta descriptions for refreshed articles](https://fathom.video/share/858bUpRJ4Pm-S4xPxMWhoZsUzNzbzixh?tab=summary&timestamp=1592.0)
  - [Need to address Google indexing issues (pending)](https://fathom.video/share/858bUpRJ4Pm-S4xPxMWhoZsUzNzbzixh?tab=summary&timestamp=1577.0)
  - [Special focus on improving click-through rate for "ultimate guide" article (high impressions, low clicks)](https://fathom.video/share/858bUpRJ4Pm-S4xPxMWhoZsUzNzbzixh?tab=summary&timestamp=1628.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Develop traffic goals for next 12 weeks based on new content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/858bUpRJ4Pm-S4xPxMWhoZsUzNzbzixh?tab=summary&timestamp=1396.0)
  - [Tom to review and approve proposed content buckets](https://fathom.video/share/858bUpRJ4Pm-S4xPxMWhoZsUzNzbzixh?tab=summary&timestamp=1531.0)
  - [Sami to continue refreshing existing articles and updating meta descriptions](https://fathom.video/share/858bUpRJ4Pm-S4xPxMWhoZsUzNzbzixh?tab=summary&timestamp=1592.0)
  - [Address Google indexing issues](https://fathom.video/share/858bUpRJ4Pm-S4xPxMWhoZsUzNzbzixh?tab=summary&timestamp=1577.0)
  - [Optimize "ultimate guide" article for better click-through rate](https://fathom.video/share/858bUpRJ4Pm-S4xPxMWhoZsUzNzbzixh?tab=summary&timestamp=1628.0)
